---
title: "Block CAT simulations"
format: html
---

```{r setup}
#| code-fold: false
#| echo: false

library(mirtCAT)
library(tidyverse)
```

Goal: simulate running of block CAT to inform selection of block thresholds

![](blockCAT_flow.png){width=75%}

```{r}
# params and thresholds from mrot_info.qmd
mrot_cat_info <- read_rds("mrot_cat_info.rds")

thresholds <- mrot_cat_info |>
  select(itemtype, next_block = block_index, block_threshold) |>
  distinct()
```

```{r}
# block + item + params needed for mirtCAT
mrot_cat_params <- mrot_cat_info |>
  mutate(d = -difficulty * discrimination,
         itemtype = as.character(itemtype)) |>
  select(itemtype, block_index, item_uid, item_entry, angle, a1 = discrimination, d, g = chance)

# mrot_cat_params |>
#   group_by(itemtype, block_index) |>
#   filter(d == max(d))
#   summarise(min_d = min(d),
#             max_d = max(d))

# read in list of items in current item bank
item_bank <- tibble(item_uid = read_lines("mrot_item_bank.txt")) |>
  mutate(item_index = 1:n()) |>
  group_by(item_uid) |>
  mutate(instance = 1:n(),
         item = paste(item_uid, instance, sep = "-")) |>
  ungroup()
item_bank_itemtype <- list("Rasch" = item_bank, "2PL" = item_bank) |> list_rbind(names_to = "itemtype")

# combine item bank and params
mrot_cat_params_bank <- mrot_cat_params |>
  left_join(item_bank_itemtype) |>
  arrange(itemtype, block_index, item_index) |>
  group_by(itemtype, block_index) |>
  mutate(item_i = 1:n()) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(-item_index, -instance)

# nest by itemtype + block and create mirt objects from params
mrot_cat_mods <- mrot_cat_params_bank |>
  nest(items = c(item_i, item_uid, item, item_entry, angle), block_pars = c(a1, d, g)) |>
  mutate(mod = map2(block_pars, itemtype, generate.mirt_object))

# theta grid to simulate over -- theta values x number of samples
theta_vals <- seq(-3, 3, by = 1)
n_samp <- 20
theta_mx <- matrix(rep(theta_vals, each = n_samp))
# initial_theta <- -2

# set starting thetas for each block to difficulty of start item
start_thetas <- mrot_cat_params_bank |>
  filter(item_i == 1) |>
  mutate(difficulty = -d / a1) |>
  select(itemtype, block_index, start_theta = difficulty)

# set up objects needed as inputs mirtCAT
mrot_cat_setup <- mrot_cat_mods |>
  left_join(start_thetas) |>
  # left_join(thresholds, by = c("itemtype", "block_index" = "next_block")) |>
  # mutate(start_theta = if_else(block_index == 1, initial_theta, block_threshold)) |>
  mutate(
    df = map(items, \(it) {
      data.frame(Questions = it$item_uid,
                 Option = matrix(c(0,1), nrow(it), 2, byrow = TRUE),
                 Type = "radio",
                 stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    }),
    patterns = map(mod, \(m) generate_pattern(m, Theta = theta_mx)),
    design = map2(items, start_theta, \(it, th) list(min_items = floor(nrow(it) / 3),
                                                     max_items = floor(nrow(it) / 3),
                                                     thetas.start = th,
                                                     theta_range = c(-6, 6))))

# run mirtCAT given arguments (specification data frame, mirt model, response pattern matrix, design parameter list)
mrot_cat <- \(df, mod, patterns, design, est_method) {
  message("Running mirtCAT...")
  mirtCAT(df, mod, method = est_method, criteria = "MI",
          local_pattern = patterns, design = design)
}

# tidy mirtCAT output into trial-level tibble
extract_cat_log <- \(cat_run) {
  imap(cat_run, \(x, i) {
    tibble(sample_i = i,
           trial_i = seq_along(x$thetas_history),
           true_theta = x$true_thetas,
           theta = x$thetas_history[,"Theta_1"],
           theta_se = x$thetas_SE_history[,"Theta_1"],
           item_i = c(NA, x$items_answered),
           correct = c(NA, x$scored_responses[x$items_answered]))
  }) |>
    list_rbind()
}

# run mirtCAT for block 1
mrot_cat_block_1 <- mrot_cat_setup |>
  filter(block_index == 1) |>
  mutate(cat = pmap(list(df, mod, patterns, design), mrot_cat))

# tidy block 1 output
cat_log_block_1 <- mrot_cat_block_1 |>
  select(itemtype, cat) |>
  deframe() |>
  map(extract_cat_log) |>
  list_rbind(names_to = "itemtype") |>
  mutate(block_index = 1, .before = everything()) |>
  left_join(mrot_cat_params_bank) |>
  mutate(item_label = paste(item_i, item_entry, angle))

ggplot(cat_log_block_1 |> filter(true_theta > 0),
       aes(x = trial_i, y = theta, colour = true_theta)) +
  facet_grid(vars(itemtype), vars(true_theta), scales = "free_y",
             labeller = labeller(true_theta = \(x) glue("θ = {x}"))) +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = block_threshold), colour = "lightgrey", linetype = "dashed",
             data = thresholds) +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = true_theta), colour = "slategrey") +
  geom_line(aes(group = sample_i), alpha = 0.8, linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_colour_viridis_c(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "Trial", y = "θ estimate")
ggsave("mrot_cat_block1_theta.png", width = 12, height = 4)

cat_log_block_1 |>
  filter(!is.na(item)) |>
  arrange(desc(angle), item_entry) |>
  mutate(item_label = paste(item_entry, angle) |> fct_inorder()) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = trial_i, y = item_label, colour = true_theta)) +
  facet_grid(vars(itemtype), vars(true_theta), scales = "free_y",
             labeller = labeller(true_theta = \(x) glue("θ = {x}"))) +
  # facet_wrap(vars(true_theta), nrow = 1, #scales = "free_y",
  #            labeller = as_labeller(\(x) glue("θ = {x}"))) +
  geom_point(size = 0.8) +
  geom_line(aes(group = sample_i), alpha = 0.8, linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_colour_viridis_c(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "Trial", y = "Item")
ggsave("mrot_cat_block1_items.png", width = 12, height = 4)


cat_log_block_1 |>
  filter(!is.na(item)) |>
  filter(trial_i <= 10) |>
  # arrange(desc(angle), item_entry) |>
  # mutate(item_label = paste(item_entry, angle) |> fct_inorder()) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = trial_i, y = angle, colour = true_theta)) +
  facet_grid(vars(itemtype), vars(true_theta), scales = "free_y",
             labeller = labeller(true_theta = \(x) glue("θ = {x}"))) +
  # facet_wrap(vars(true_theta), nrow = 1, #scales = "free_y",
  #            labeller = as_labeller(\(x) glue("θ = {x}"))) +
  geom_point(size = 0.8) +
  geom_line(aes(group = sample_i), alpha = 0.8, linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_colour_viridis_c(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "Trial", y = "Item")

cat_log_block_1 |>
  count(trial_i, item_entry, angle)
```

```{r}
# block_1_pass <- cat_log_block_1 |>
#   mutate(next_block = block_index + 1) |>
#   left_join(thresholds) |>
#   filter(theta >= block_threshold) #|>
  # group_by(sample_i) |>
  # filter(trial_i == max(trial_i))

ggplot(block_1_pass, #|> filter(true_theta > 0),
       aes(x = trial_i, y = theta, colour = true_theta)) +
  facet_grid(vars(itemtype), vars(true_theta), scales = "free_y",
             labeller = labeller(true_theta = \(x) glue("θ = {x}"))) +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = true_theta), colour = "lightgrey") +
  geom_line(aes(group = sample_i), alpha = 0.8, linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_colour_viridis_c(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "Trial", y = "θ estimate")

block_1_thetas <- cat_log_block_1 |>
  group_by(itemtype, sample_i) |>
  filter(trial_i == max(trial_i)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(itemtype, sample_i, theta_block_1 = theta)

# run mirtCAT for block 1
mrot_cat_block_1 <- mrot_cat_setup |>
  filter(block_index == 2) |>
  # mutate(design = map(design, \(de) ))
  mutate(cat = pmap(list(df, mod, patterns, design), mrot_cat))

```

```{r}
mrot_cat_block <- mrot_cat_setup |>
  expand_grid(tibble(method = c("EAP", "MAP", "ML"))) |>
  mutate(cat = pmap(list(df, mod, patterns, design, method), mrot_cat))

cat_log_block <- mrot_cat_block |>
  mutate(cat_log = map(cat, extract_cat_log)) |>
  select(itemtype, block_index, method, cat_log) |>
  unnest(cat_log) |>
  left_join(mrot_cat_params_bank) |>
  mutate(item_label = paste(item_i, item_entry, angle),
         block_trial = paste(block_index, trial_i))

cat_log_block |> filter(itemtype == "2PL", method == "EAP") |>
ggplot(aes(x = trial_i, y = theta, colour = true_theta)) +
  facet_grid(vars(block_index), vars(true_theta), scales = "free_y",
             labeller = labeller(true_theta = \(x) glue("θ = {x}"))) +
  # facet_wrap(vars(true_theta), scales = "free_y", nrow = 1,
  #            labeller = labeller(true_theta = \(x) glue("θ = {x}"))) +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = block_threshold),
             colour = "lightgrey", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.25,
             data = thresholds |> filter(itemtype == "2PL", !is.na(block_threshold))) +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = true_theta), linewidth = 0.25, colour = "slategrey") +
  geom_line(aes(group = sample_i), alpha = 0.8, linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_colour_viridis_c(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "Trial", y = "θ estimate")
ggsave("mrot_cat_allblocks_theta.png", width = 10, height = 3)

cat_log_block |>
  filter(itemtype == "2PL", method == "EAP") |>
  filter(!is.na(item)) |>
  filter(true_theta %in% c(-2, 0, 2)) |>
  arrange(desc(block_index), desc(angle), item_entry) |>
  mutate(item_label = paste(item_entry, angle) |> fct_inorder()) |>
  arrange(sample_i, block_index, trial_i) |>
  mutate(block_trial = block_trial |> fct_inorder()) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = block_trial, y = item_label, colour = true_theta)) +
  facet_grid(vars(block_index), vars(true_theta), scales = "free_y", space = "free_y",
             labeller = labeller(true_theta = \(x) glue("θ = {x}"))) +
  # facet_grid(vars(itemtype), vars(true_theta), scales = "free_y",
  #            labeller = labeller(true_theta = \(x) glue("θ = {x}"))) +
  # facet_wrap(vars(true_theta), nrow = 1, #scales = "free_y",
  #            labeller = as_labeller(\(x) glue("θ = {x}"))) +
  geom_point(size = 0.8) +
  geom_line(aes(group = sample_i), alpha = 0.8, linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_colour_viridis_c(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "Trial", y = "Item")

final_thetas <- cat_log_block |>
  group_by(method, itemtype, block_index, sample_i) |>
  filter(trial_i == max(trial_i)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(method, itemtype, block_index, sample_i, true_theta, theta, theta_se) |>
  filter(itemtype == "2PL") |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = method, values_from = c(theta, theta_se))
ggplot(final_thetas, aes(x = theta_MAP, y = theta_EAP)) +
  facet_grid(vars(block_index), vars(true_theta), scales = "free_y",
             labeller = labeller(true_theta = \(x) glue("θ = {x}"))) +
  geom_point()

```
